# Expedited Delivery

Expedited delivery promises arrival within two business days in exchange for a twelve-dollar surcharge. To ship the same day an order must be submitted before two o'clock in the afternoon local time; orders placed later are dispatched the next morning. This faster service is not offered for oversized freight items or for addresses beyond the contiguous states.

[Source: shipping_options.md#expedited-delivery]
